metadata.name: Missouri Entity Details
metadata.description: Extract entity details from Missouri SOS detail page including General Information, Filings with PDF downloads, and Principal Office Address tabs

variables.name: entityId
variables.description: MO entity ID (injected by handler from decoded uniqueKey)

variables.name: correlationId
variables.description: Trace correlation ID from calling client

actions.description: Load MO entity detail page by ID
Wait for General Information tab content to render
actions.javascript: () => { const text = document.body.innerText || ''; return text.includes('General Information') || text.includes('Charter No'); }

actions.description: Extract General Information from Bootstrap div.row/col-3 layout: label-value pairs in swOuterPanelWhiteBox container, agent name from lRegAgentValue span, address from swLabelWrap span. Uses innerText for address fields to preserve line-break whitespace.
actions.javascript: () => { const normalize = (v) => (v || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const container = document.querySelector('.swOuterPanelWhiteBox'); if (!container) return JSON.stringify({}); const fields = {}; const rows = container.querySelectorAll('.row'); for (const row of rows) { const cols = Array.from(row.querySelectorAll('[class*="col-"]')); for (let i = 0; i < cols.length - 1; i += 2) { const label = normalize(cols[i].textContent); const value = normalize(cols[i+1].innerText); if (label) fields[label] = value; } } const agentSpan = container.querySelector('[id*="lRegAgentValue"]'); let agentName = null; let agentAddress = null; if (agentSpan) { const nameDiv = agentSpan.querySelector('div[style*="padding-bottom"]') || agentSpan.querySelector(':scope > div'); agentName = nameDiv ? normalize(nameDiv.textContent) : null; const addrSpan = agentSpan.querySelector('.swLabelWrap'); agentAddress = addrSpan ? normalize(addrSpan.innerText) : null; } return JSON.stringify({ name: fields['Name(s)'] || null, entityType: fields['Type'] || null, charterNumber: fields['Charter No.'] || fields['Charter No'] || null, domesticity: fields['Domesticity'] || null, homeState: fields['Home State'] || null, registeredAgentName: agentName, registeredAgentAddress: agentAddress, status: fields['Status'] || null, dateFormed: fields['Date Formed'] || null, duration: fields['Duration'] || null }); }

actions.description: Click Filings tab to switch via ASP.NET postback

target.description: Filings tab link in Telerik RadTabStrip

actions.description: Extract filing rows from Telerik RadGrid on Filings tab. Grid has 7 columns: [0]=hidden ID, [1]=order checkbox, [2]=View Document button, [3]=Action, [4]=Type, [5]=Date Filed, [6]=Effective Date. Button onclick calls ShowFiledDocumentForBEFiling(docId, version) which opens popup to /Common/CorrespondenceItemViewHandler.ashx.
actions.javascript: () => { const normalize = (v) => (v || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const grids = document.querySelectorAll('table.rgMasterTable'); const target = Array.from(grids).find(g => { const hs = Array.from(g.querySelectorAll('th')).map(h => normalize(h.textContent)); return hs.some(h => h.includes('Date Filed')); }); if (!target) return JSON.stringify([]); const rows = Array.from(target.querySelectorAll('tbody tr')).filter(r => r.querySelectorAll('td').length >= 7); return JSON.stringify(rows.map((row, idx) => { const cells = Array.from(row.querySelectorAll('td')); let docUrl = null; const btn = cells[2]?.querySelector('input[type=submit][value*="View"],input[type=button],button'); if (btn) { const oc = btn.getAttribute('onclick') || ''; const m = oc.match(/ShowFiledDocumentForBEFiling\s*\(\s*(\d+)\s*,\s*(\d+)\s*\)/); if (m) { docUrl = 'https://bsd.sos.mo.gov/Common/CorrespondenceItemViewHandler.ashx?IsTIFF=true&filedDocumentid=' + m[1] + '&version=' + m[2]; } } return { action: normalize(cells[3]?.textContent || ''), documentType: normalize(cells[4]?.textContent || ''), dateFiled: normalize(cells[5]?.textContent || '') || null, effectiveDate: normalize(cells[6]?.textContent || '') || null, rowIndex: idx, hasViewDocument: !!docUrl, storageUrl: docUrl, fileName: null, error: null }; })); }

actions.description: Click Principal Office Address tab to switch via ASP.NET postback

target.description: Principal Office Address tab link in Telerik RadTabStrip

actions.description: Extract principal office address rows from visible Telerik RadGrid: 5 columns [id, type, address, since, to]. Uses innerText on address cell to preserve line-break whitespace.
actions.javascript: () => { const normalize = (v) => (v || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const grids = document.querySelectorAll('table.rgMasterTable'); const target = Array.from(grids).find(g => { const hs = Array.from(g.querySelectorAll('th')).map(h => normalize(h.textContent)); return hs.some(h => h === 'Address' || h === 'Since'); }); if (!target) return JSON.stringify([]); const rows = Array.from(target.querySelectorAll('tbody tr')).filter(r => r.querySelectorAll('td').length >= 3); return JSON.stringify(rows.map(row => { const cells = Array.from(row.querySelectorAll('td')); return { addressType: normalize(cells[1]?.textContent || ''), address: normalize(cells[2]?.innerText || ''), since: normalize(cells[3]?.textContent || '') || null }; })); }
